summary: Testing focus review of CC-0117. Test coverage is comprehensive across all existing tiers (unit, envtest integration, Chainsaw e2e). reconcile_adminpassword_test.go mirrors reconcile_dbcredentials_test.go with all five required tests (Managed_CreatesExternalSecret, NotReady_SetsConditionFalseAndRequeues, Ready_SetsConditionTrue, Brownfield_NoExternalSecret_ReadyTrue, RemoteKeyFor_And_SecretName_DistinctPerControlPlane). The corrected TestReconcileKeystone_ClusterRefsDerivedFromInfrastructure assertion, the new managed-override/brownfield Keystone tests, the readAdminPassword managed test, the extractor managed/brownfield tests, and the new integration phase + TestIntegration_AdminPasswordGate_BlocksKeystoneUntilExternalSecretReady are all present. All unit tests pass (go test -count=1) and all 6 envtest integration tests pass (285s, incl. the new gate test). Assertions are specific (owner-ref kind/name, remoteRef key+property, CreationPolicy, distinct-per-CP table, non-mutation of cp.Spec).

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (unit + integration, uncached)
Edge cases covered: managed, brownfield, ES-not-ready, ES-ready, distinct-per-CP (ns/name), legacy keystone-admin non-collision
Error/gate cases tested: AdminPassword gate blocks Keystone projection until ES Ready (integration)
Assertions specific (exact owner-ref, remoteRef key/property, condition reason, requeue interval)
Test tier completeness: unit + envtest integration + Chainsaw e2e all extended
Non-mutation asserted: cp.Spec.KORC.AdminCredential.PasswordSecretRef untouched in brownfield + managed override

code_quality_checklist.item: New tests mirror the CC-0116 DB-credential test shape (no novel ad-hoc structure)
Fixture spec ref kept != projected name so override assertions genuinely prove the override (documented DECISION)

security_checklist.item: e2e admin-password Secret diagnostics dump keys only (describe), not values

architecture_checklist.item: Drift guard TestSubReconcilerConditionTypesCoversAllNames passes with the new AdminPassword entry

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Integration sync helper factored (simulateAdminPasswordExternalSecretSyncWhenPresent) mirroring the DB analog

fail_fast_checklist.item: Chainsaw admin-password-scoping uses set -euo pipefail with assert_eq fail-and-exit; presence guard exits 0 only on absent stack

defensive_checklist.item: e2e presence guard (CRDs + ClusterSecretStore) prevents hard-fail on stacks without the operator

suggested_improvements: TestAdminPasswordRemoteKeyFor_And_SecretName_DistinctPerControlPlane and its DB-credential sibling are near-identical in shape; a future table-driven consolidation across credential families could reduce duplication (non-blocking, matches the consolidate-near-duplicate-tests advisory).
